# @form-eng/mantine

> Mantine v7 field components for @form-eng/core. 13 field types with strong 1:1 Mantine component mappings.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/mantine/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/mantine/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@form-eng/mantine](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@form-eng/mantine)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-hook-form`, `@form-eng/core`, `@mantine/core`, `@mantine/dates`

## API Surface

### Registry
- `createMantineFieldRegistry()` -- Creates the default Mantine field registry (`Record<string, React.JSX.Element>`) for use with `InjectedFieldProvider`

### Editable Field Components (12)
- `Textbox` -- Mantine `TextInput`
- `Number` -- Mantine `NumberInput`
- `Toggle` -- Mantine `Switch`
- `Dropdown` -- Mantine `Select`
- `SimpleDropdown` -- Mantine `Select` for string arrays
- `MultiSelect` -- Mantine `MultiSelect`
- `DateControl` -- Native `<input type="date">`
- `Slider` -- Mantine `Slider`
- `RadioGroup` -- Mantine `Radio.Group` + `Radio`
- `CheckboxGroup` -- Mantine `Checkbox.Group` + `Checkbox`
- `Textarea` -- Mantine `Textarea`
- `DynamicFragment` -- `<input type="hidden">`

### Read-Only Field Components (1)
- `ReadOnly` -- `ReadOnlyText`

### Supporting Components
- `ReadOnlyText` -- Shared read-only text display
- `StatusMessage` -- Form status display
- `FormLoading` -- Loading state

### Helpers
- `FieldClassName()` -- Build CSS class name with error state
- `GetFieldDataTestId()` -- Build data-testid attribute
- `formatDateTime()` -- Format date string for display
- `DocumentLinksStrings` -- Default string literals for document links UI

## Code Example

```tsx
import { RulesEngineProvider, InjectedFieldProvider, FormEngine } from "@form-eng/core";
import { createMantineFieldRegistry } from "@form-eng/mantine";
import "@mantine/core/styles.css";

const formConfig = {
  version: 2,
  fields: {
    name: { type: "Textbox", label: "Name", required: true },
    role: { type: "Dropdown", label: "Role", options: [
      { value: "admin", label: "Admin" },
      { value: "user", label: "User" },
    ]},
  },
  fieldOrder: ["name", "role"],
};

function App() {
  return (
    <RulesEngineProvider>
      <InjectedFieldProvider injectedFields={createMantineFieldRegistry()}>
        <FormEngine formConfig={formConfig} saveData={async (data) => data} />
      </InjectedFieldProvider>
    </RulesEngineProvider>
  );
}
```
